_notes: Caps are YOURS to set; defaults are conservative placeholders. kelly_fraction 0.25 = quarter-Kelly. Awards need a bigger edge because the Boot model is cruder (opposition-unadjusted shares). Golden Ball/Glove are never bet: no calibrated model exists for them. exact_score/totals/btts/spread ship OFF — exact-score cells are the model's thinnest claims; totals/btts/spread are better calibrated (mid-grid) but opt in deliberately. halftime/second_half use the fitted half_split=0.447 (2,360 goals, six tournaments); first_to_score uses the Poisson race argument; futures come from the 100k-sim ensemble. corners: intercept-only NegBin base rate (xG slope failed LOTO validation) — an anchor against lazy thin books only. max_per_match_usdc caps combined exposure per fixture (and per team for futures) across all categories. Freshness rails: max_plan_age_min (place_bets refuses older plans), max_price_drop_cents (a live ask far BELOW plan is information, not a bargain - skip), max_sims_age_hours (run.py refuses stale model outputs).
